reviews.review_title: Used to be more fun, now just greedy
reviews.review_description:
This game was real fun in the beginning but not any more. The continuous push for buying coin packages is too much. The irritating " buy me " robot gets in the way of game play. I just quit playing and come back in a few days when it is gone. The game takes back twice what I win so I refuse to pay for any coins.  Why pay real money for fake coins that can't be used anywhere? Give me a fake bank account to buy your fake coins and I will buy all the packages.

Now can't join others in rooms we create. Can't hear each other if we happen to land in the same room. Software is up to date.

Id like to say the game is pretty، graphics are good and slots look nice, the sounds are on point as well however the daily bonus coins that are provided are only enough for 2 or 3 minutes of play on lowest bet as the slots rarely pay anything above your bet. At this point I don't think its worth the storage to keep on my device really and im certainly not spending real cash on this.. anyways take this review as you take it.

reviews.review_title: Cant play game due to bug
reviews.review_description: Hi itried now 3 days in a row but still when i go in the app no hands are showable and my left blue watch is located like 3 metres away leading to just walking around but not being able to play machines or do anything
When playing poker I start out with billions and the game starts to glitch and the next thing I know I am broke this is not right. This had happened to me a4 to 5 different times.

reviews.review_title: I like it a lot ☺️ BUT
reviews.review_description:
I changed my review… players taunting and berating you… you CAN BLOCK AND MUTE BUT they can still see you and occasionally you still hear them… what’s the point of blocking or muting !!!!!   I love the money tree ideas and also the games they have but if they don’t fix the issues w kids and blocking/muting where we can have fun and feel safe then I won’t be back on and I spend ALOT OF MONEY. I need to see change immediately or I’m going to another app !!!!


UPDATE: Occasional annoying kids and adults whom can’t grasp that it a GAME AND A COMPETITION. Elsewise still very fun !!! Fix before you lose good paying people.

reviews.review_title: bug cause I can not play thegame
reviews.review_description: Last night well last night, but today I can't see my hands when I enter the game, and my left hand watch is 2 meters away from me in front of the right. Even if I uninstall and reinstall, there is still this inexplicable bug. Because of this, I can't play at all now
Was playing for a while and was fun at first, but it seems the devs have gotten greedy and it’s hard to win much anymore.

I've been playing VR for 4 years now and this is the first review I have ever written. This game was ok until a recent update. Now the blackjack game cheats even more than before. The more you bet the more it cheats. Been playing this game daily for over a year but I'm done. Don't waste your time or money. There are better games out there than this.

As so many others have pointed out, this game was very fun and a great escape in the beginning. Then, as if there is trial period , the mechanics of the game kick in and the game places you in a position where buying coins is the only viable way of continuing to enjoy the games. Don't get me wrong, i understand the developers need to generate income to keep the game going, so I'm not against the push, but the packages are not priced relative to the investment.  There needs to be more tiers and better overall ROI. One large purchase should enable a decent length of gameplay, just as several small purchases should give decent short term gains.

i used to really enjoy the game and then i realized it was all about the money. I will go and spend billions and billions of in game coins and get nothing, but the very moment i pay a little bit of money oh all of a sudden i start getting bonuses and winning all this money and then it's gone within an hour. seems to me like a rip off you get a little bit of coin for your money and that's about it and i have spent a lot of money trust. the amount of coins you get for your real money is definitely not worth it

I went up to 50M and randomly my money had started to fall down. All of these 1B-500B players are cheating. Report them if you see one. Do not Play or you will never be like those 5B-500B players. Such a bad game. Needs to have a system where you can gain money every 5 minutes.

Edit: Been playing for about a week continuously and I enjoyed it so much at first… however… it seems that as soon as you start doing well, it decides ‘nope!’ and sucks you dry of any wins whatsoever and then gives you a pop up to ask if you’d like to ‘turn back time’ to get back some of your winnings (at a cost of course). Bit suspect! It’s like it pushes you towards making in-game purchases. Not what I signed up for in downloading this game. I don’t mind losing. It’s pretend gambling after all. But it seems rigged towards buying coins. No thanks.   

This game sucks you in, so much fun, but equally frustrating when you start losing (much like real life!). Would like to see more slots. Overall a great game.

there are so many glitches. I have two profiles on one headset and it was so like dial up slow, now both are that way. A lot of the times i can hear my friends but cant see them. There are times when you try a slot machine, or money tree and it takes your money. I have lost billians this way so have my friends. When i first got this game i thought it was worth it, but now anyone i talk to i just say its not worth it. I tried to play today but it was frozen that it wouldn't load in i had to restart my headset. Eve had vr since 2022 and cant figure this out. Onto get this one guys
Would love the 20 million coins

reviews.review_title: Was loving it, now not so much
reviews.review_description:
Edit: you can see my original review below and I was honestly having a great time. However it seems you get to a point, start doing well, and then that seems to change as they push you towards buying coins. Since it started doing this I don’t tend to win hardly anything. Very odd and most annoying. I would gladly pay for this game as a one off if it would make it fair. I know it’s the nature of ‘gambling’ but it feels a bit suspect.  

Taken me a while to find this game and it’s very addictive once you do! There’s been the occasional glitch but nothing that don’t sort itself out. Need to figure out the art of keeping my money!no
If people were not cheating at the money tree this game would be spot on.
Was fine for so long now i cant get my hands to show up. Tried everything
it takes up my storage and won’t let me delete it
Game use to be fun but not anymore as soon as you win a little it takes it all back and the coin buying is awful blackjack is the same way now. If i coulf give a 0 star i would
I like this game , so far it's best slots game , good graphics . There are even blackjack

Predatory practices abound, do not waste your money and if you have a problem (which this game preys on), seek help. Good luck and I hope this company turns itself around and make this a fun and playable game.

This place is good for 1 decent play through a month. 
My experience shows the same results every single time. The coin that is won will be reclaimed with 48 hours. 
It doesn’t matter the game or bet level. You bet low and it will be reclaimed slower! This place still only gets 1 star from me! 
It’s fake slots and overpriced coin packages. 
I don’t find a game fun if all it does is just take coin away from you every visit. This place is broken and needs some serious fixing! 
Good luck though lol
Response to the devs, I come back to play just like every one else… in hopes that today won’t suck as bad as my last visit but they are equal every time. Trust me I would be your biggest supporter if I actually seen a game worthy of it. 98% of the time I will have like 10 minutes of play before everything is gone! I’m here to tell you that my visits are quick because you guys are so GREEDY! Hoping that people will pay them way overpriced coin packages! I will never blow another dime with you guys! You got me early on but I quickly learned it was a COMPLETE RIP OFF! Trust me I’m waiting for the next casino style game to just move right along from these fake slots. 
I se a lot of people changing their reviews after seeing what this place really is A RIP OFF

Ruby ring come on now 20 dollars suppose be 3 days but says 2 days left kinda not right millionaire is fun and all but ruby price kinda a rip off suppose be 3 days not 2 days for 20 bucks think should be 6 days we need moderators  all time on poker slots there’s so many awful kids coming on getting in your face throw chips at you it’s starting not be fun anymore one reason why I left pokerstars out of control make this 21+ keep the kids out of the game  ￼

I'm a casual VegasB player. It's fun to drop in once a day to collector's your daily free coin and freebies from the moneytree, which adds up if you're not too greedy (which I'm sure they count on!) They have a modest selection of slots and a couple of roulette and blackjack tables, if that's your thing. A separate area for poker, as well.  
I've yet to buy any upgrades in their store so, I can't comment on that...standard upsales pitch here, not too aggresive IMO.
Give 'em a try.

￼ if you wanna play poker and play in the casino, this is the app for you. The best thing about this app or the people that play it and also the friends that you make along the way from all over the world this app is simply the best app I’ve played so far. I encourage you to download this app come and play some poker and enjoy the company that you’re gonna run into. ￼

reviews.review_title: This has turned into a crummy game.
reviews.review_description: This used to be my favorite game. They play favoritism to players. I used to say all kinds of nice things but not anymore. I know of people that have quit due to their unfair practices.  People can block you and you cant see them at the money tree. That's  cheating in my book. That was the only thing that made it fun for me. When you block them you get payback as they can't see you anymore. You can see that they are still there when you press your right indent button. Now you cant anymore and you cant catch anything anymore. I guess I have to join the haters on Facebook now.

developer_response.body: We’re sorry to hear about your frustration and appreciate you taking the time to share this. We’ll evaluate how blocking works to make sure the Money Tree remains fair, even though it’s a competitive feature. Your feedback helps us improve the experience for everyone.

reviews.review_description: This is a fun casino but wish the slot machines would get changed out sometimes.  i bought the 19.99 package with ring for access to the high slot area and honestly for that price you should have access to that area for more than 3 days. Love the money tree but the folks who cheat ruin the fun.

I have a lot of fun playing this game. I have read other reviews and i have never had my winnings taken back without me spending it. Also you don't have to spend all your coin. If you cant see your friend or partner try quiting out andgoing back in through"join locarion". But yes, they need to fix that little bug. It happens to my husband and i sometimes but we find a work-around.

I enjoy the game daily but lately it tends to take way more than it gives. I love the bonus games on many of the machines but they don’t seem to happen as often as they use to. Not sure why the slots seem to have stopped most of the winnings lately. But all in all…. I enjoy the app. I’d give 5 stars if the bonus games hit more often.
I have made several wonderful friends in this game that I now visit with while playing the games. Also, The new Atlantis option is wonderful!!!
I like this game so far.Because makes me fold lots of good hands , after seeing 👀 so many straights and flush and if I ever think about buying coins, it's because I cannot play the game.

It's a casino arcade. You will win. Just don't be like me and get stuck thinking your about to hit  another one. Just hope on the next night. Sometimes you just got too walk away. I always seem to come back. Poker is fun too 3 1/2 stars

reviews.review_title: Not as fun as it was in the beginning
reviews.review_description: When losing 100 million poker chips for the last 3 weeks and not able to catch a good hand in poker. It sucks to have to start all over to build your chips back up. I have met a lot of good people here, that's probably the reason why I'm still playing.

reviews.review_title: Reply to against all odds review
reviews.review_description:
It was said that this app is a ripoff. Aren’t all casinos a ripoff? That’s why they’re in business. I think it’s very fun. There’s a wide variety of slot machines, my favorite ones are Jungle Jim, the pirate one and the lucky charms guy. In addition to that there’s roulette ￼and blackjack. You can teleport to the poker room where you can interact with other players. I think it’s a great time for all(except for player “Against all odds “ I guess.

I give it 5 Stars and 2 Thumbs up

This is my favorite casino app that l've played on Meta. It's easy to navigate throughout the casino, has it has the fewest glitches, the slots have fun animations, and there are multiple opportunities to get free coins throughout the day.

i love this app and play it daily, but i think an update should take place to get rid of the “low memory” that causes it to force quit. i have plenty of space and storage because i only play 2 games, and use 2 video streaming app. i’ve cleared cashe and restarted my headset often. it is also a brand new out of the box meta quest 3. 🤷🏼‍♂️

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed report and for playing daily, we really appreciate it. We pushed a patch on Jan 8 to address the low-memory issue. Please make sure you’re on the latest version and let us know if you’re still experiencing this on your Quest 3.

reviews.review_description: The game stopped working after I purchased a $19.99 package and it won’t let me go back in or redownload from the App Store. I have tried everything to get back into this game and I keep getting error code 3. Waste of money.

VB is a lot of fun. I spin for coins everyday so i can get into the V.I.P. Room now that i have accomplished that I want to get to level 70 to get into Atlantis. Poker, Blackjack etc. Plenty to do. Graphics are great.

i love Vegas billionaire 😀 they update the games so you're not bored. they have created new rooms to have more fun 😆 sometimes i don't realize how much time i am playing... Definitely worth checking it out.
Graphics are absolutely the best, really immersive. Can have great payouts.

Ok it’s very fun to choose characters and I enjoyed to play but I don’t like machines spin fast some works well it’s  very good game and all other games fun ok I decided to give this 5 star because it cute

i get all the fun and excitement of a real casino Right at home. I especially love the feature of playing the machines right in my living room. When i had an issue support responded right away. Try it!
I am 65 yes old, bought 3 years ago and play everyday. Fun machines and it is always changing to keep it fun. More than than poker stars game.  You won't be sorry playing this game!!!
After playing this a while i have noticed that if you win big a one slot machine its really hard or inpossable to win big again on the same machine.

Only has partial hand tracking support.

Hand tracking support doesn't allow walking around in the space.

Really enjoy playing this game. The slots are Good and they pay.  thE money tree is fun nd amazingyou xlsp. Its a great way to regain chips whebn your luck is out
I like the slots and have found that winning bonus rounds are often enough to keep me happy. I chose to keep microphone off and sound lower and like having that option.
Seems to be inconsistent with winning and losing Streaks, but better than me going to a real world casino losing my real world money. Def recommend if you enjoy slots
Great *****
I like slots but wish there was named slots like vegas, wizard of oz, little shop of horror, shark week ect. Something with more exciting bonuses
i play this every day. You get bonus every day. Instead of going to the real casino, I can get it out of my system without losing real money.

i like this game because you get more chances to win more coins than other casino app i really enjoy this game.

My favourite game to play with friends, I like that there is multiple games to pick from and also that they are regularly adding new games and if you need support the discord team helped me and sorted my problem! 5 stars from me 😃

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! 🙌 We’re really glad you’re enjoying playing with friends and the variety of games. We’ve put a lot of effort into building our multi-poker table rooms to make the experience more social and seamless, so it’s great to hear you’re enjoying it. Big thanks for the 5 stars and for being part of the community! 😊
